semantic.role: Public API surface inventory and entry point registry
responsibilities: Catalog all CLI commands and their entry points
List all MCP (Model Context Protocol) endpoints
Provide a machine-readable and human-readable map of the system's public surface

English.purpose: This document serves as a comprehensive registry of all public-facing interfaces in the ArchSpine system. It is automatically generated to provide a single source of truth for CLI commands, MCP endpoints, and exported modules, ensuring developers and AI agents can quickly discover available entry points.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers, system integrators, and AI agents who need to understand the complete public API surface of ArchSpine. This includes both human readers reviewing the system's capabilities and automated tools that consume the structured data for integration or testing purposes.
key_takeaways: Auto-generated inventory of all public entry points
Covers three categories: CLI, MCP, and exported modules
Experimental view that evolves with the system

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是 ArchSpine 系统中所有公开接口的完整注册表。它自动生成，提供 CLI 命令、MCP 端点和导出模块的单一可信来源，确保开发者和 AI 代理能够快速发现可用的入口点。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于需要了解 ArchSpine 完整公开 API 表面的开发者、系统集成商和 AI 代理。既包括人工审查系统能力，也包括自动化工具消费结构化数据以进行集成或测试。
key_takeaways: 所有公开入口点的自动生成清单
覆盖三类：CLI、MCP 和导出模块
通过 `spine sync` 命令刷新
随系统演进的实验性视图
